textByHash.859b2e1881fefda6372592fad922e91622433caa: Hi there, looking for a challenge are you?
textByHash.fdba104573751163f5a48524e1919eb384d2b260: Shame, I don't think I have anything for you. Train up your Thieving skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.
textByHash.5edfbb789736a13eaae893d3d639006ed46b0f34: Shame, I don't think I have anything for you. Train up your Agility skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.
textByHash.ca21d14219da50bd9cd1f059489dfea569b02dea: Aha, I have the perfect thing for you! See if you can get to the centre of my maze, the further you get the greater the rewards. There's even some special prizes if you make it right to the end.
textByHash.0b8de16df449c06d683ea33a0095065a773ed548: Great! When you enter the maze, I'll give you a jewel - it'll allow you to get out of the maze at any time. However that's all you're allowed to take in with you, no cheating!
textByHash.1a669ecab9203229fe2af1b76683436a8753b2c3: Oh one last thing, if you happen to see my harmonica I'd really like to have it back.
textByHash.0283c30ee393bcea918d3872a3532a47ad25859c: Ah welcome to my humble home, well actually it belongs to mummsie but she's getting on a bit so I look after the place for her.
textByHash.1fdd8c8fb8d3f4e116ec79e119425c622ffdfe29: So are you interested in a challenge?
textByHash.1f79a72449b874ab1b5aa3c671990637a4c26cd6: Hi again, what can I do for you?
textByHash.bf5f0bb4a40010bc5af29d7fb002577630989044: Certainly, when you enter the maze I'll give you another jewel. Good luck!
textByHash.1898091c0516316a17ac689fdb57ce8fef2c6762: And where do you think you're going? A little too eager I think. Come and talk to me before you go wandering around in there.
textByHash.73e4ba0d2b56d79212a1361597614d4012d26204: Tut tut tut, now you know you're not allowed to take anything except that jewel in with you.
textByHash.82c42a5a5fb8848aafcb58150be1bf1404f69e79: Sorry but I can't allow you to take your follower in there, never know what trouble they might cause.
textByHash.e1ba7d6642aa355e4346e867d7bb39f06522579d: Oh dear, you really didn't get very far did you?
textByHash.dccf51d5b3fed608aaf37a139a7678f7cda4a735: Well you didn't do too badly, but you didn't make it nearly as far as others have.
textByHash.3f2f0d3a4f3426daeebc78fb557c2dd521ce00f8: Amazing, you made it so far!
textByHash.1ffa5fd3284dc153b3bdc631de66084452ad0deb: Wow you even managed to get the prize, well done!
textByHash.0d0775250d898d9e5b3ac24c2829051f5b49eba2: Want to come out then? Giving up are you? You know there's no time limit here.
textByHash.7b5386dd5fa80683f09a6c72087013bda84b4a43: Right you are then, out you come.
